label: Body part record
description: A single node in a pawn body tree. References a BodyPartDef for base stats and may contain recursive child records via parts.

def.label: Def
def.description: The BodyPartDef that defines the base stats for this body part record.

customLabel.label: Custom label
customLabel.description: Overrides the display label for this specific body part record instance.

parts.label: Parts
parts.description: Child body part records nested under this record. Each item is itself a BodyPartRecord.

height.label: Height
height.description: Vertical zone of this body part. Affects attack targeting and apparel coverage.

depth.label: Depth
depth.description: Whether this body part is inside or outside the body. Affects damage penetration and apparel coverage.

coverage.label: Coverage
coverage.description: Relative coverage of this body part under its parent, as a fraction of the parent's coverage.

groups.label: Groups
groups.description: BodyPartGroupDef groups this body part record belongs to.

woundAnchorTag.label: Wound anchor tag
woundAnchorTag.description: String tag used to anchor wound and hediff graphics to this body part.

flipGraphic.label: Flip graphic
flipGraphic.description: If true, the graphic for this body part is flipped horizontally.

visibleHediffRots.label: Visible hediff rotations
visibleHediffRots.description: Cardinal directions in which hediff graphics on this body part are rendered.
